title: Adaptive crypto trading, running on autopilot.
author: Internal_Piccolo_194
selftext: A daily-reversal pattern bot with two strategies running in parallel, a Bayesian + online-ML learner that gets smarter each trade, and a browser dashboard you actually want to look at.With superior breakout trading strategies that deliver more wins than losses, combined with perfect risk control, enjoy the comfort of the future with the bot (https://reversal-bot-license.fly.dev/)
